'''Necil Sing''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Coruscanti/Legends|to]]<ref name="DB" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Complete Locations">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="DB" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> she was a patron of the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="DB" /> a [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] hall in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of Coruscant,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> during the [[Local day/Legends|night]] of the [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|attempted assassination]] of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. After the assassin, [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]], ran into the club, Sing talked with a Human next to<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref> a [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]]<ref name="Complete Locations" /> when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] entered searching for Wesell. The woman later walked past Skywalker when he surveyed the crowd.<ref name="AOTC" /> 

Sing had [[Color/Legends|dark]] skin, brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]]<ref name="DB" /> worn up in a conical hairstyle. During her visit to the Outlander, she wore a dark [[Clothing/Legends|outfit]]<ref name="AOTC" /> and a beaded silver veil.<ref name="Insider" />

==Behind the scenes==
Necil Sing first appeared in the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']],<ref name="AOTC" /> which released on [[May 16]], [[2002]].<ref name="Year">''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''</ref> The Outlander Club scenes including Sing, who was portrayed by uncredited extra,<ref name="AOTC" /> were shot at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]] on [[July 17]], [[2000]].<ref name="Mythmaking">''[[Mythmaking: Behind the Scenes of Attack of the Clones]]''</ref> The extra playing the character, in costume, introduced the ninth episode of the Episode II behind-the-scenes video series [[On location|''on location'']].<ref name="On location">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/bts/onloc/9.html|series=On Location|text=Part 9 - In the Money}}</ref> The episode, "In The Money," released on [[September 9]], [[2000]].<ref name="Archive">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/bts/onloc/archive.html|text=''on location'' archive}}</ref> 

Sing was first identified in in an Episode II [[Depth Commentary]] available on [[StarWars.com]] that could be accessed through the DVD-ROM home release of Attack of the Clones<ref name="DepthCommentary">{{HomeVideoCite|film=2|featurette=Depth Commentary}}</ref> on [[November 12]], 2002.<ref name="DVD">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/news/2002/08/news20020801.html|text=Episode II On DVD & VHS}}</ref> The character's name is anagram for "licensing."<ref name="Insider" />
